name: aviation_safety_school_district_s_new_mesa_st_lt
premise: Bird-strike risk spiked after a wetland restoration project; wildlife staff wants a runway-use curfew operations refuses. In Aviation Safety, the situation tagged internally around aviation safety school district new mesa st lt has converged with local pressure in the Redwood Bay corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Mei Diallo
agents.identity: I am Mei Diallo, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Aviation Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Camila Haddad
agents.identity: I am Camila Haddad, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Aviation Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of long term.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of short term even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Diallo must choose under short term versus long term. What does Mei Diallo do?
